zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Way於1665年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯普洛維登斯時，他的父親George Way51歲，母親Elizabeth Smith36歲。他於1687年與Ann Lester在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1726年10月20日在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文易亞斯特 哈文享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Way于1665年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯普洛維登斯时，他的父亲George Way51岁，母亲Elizabeth Smith36岁。他于1687年与Ann Lester在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦劍橋大學默里 倫敦结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1726年10月20日在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文易亞斯特 哈文享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Way
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly southern): topographic name for someone who lived near a road or path, from Middle English wei (Old English weg, cognate with Old Norse vegr, Old High German weg), or a habitational name from some minor place called with this word, as for example any of the places called Way or Waye in Devon or Way in Somerset and Kent.

variants.name: Wei
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ming, Wei, Li, Chao, Hong, Cheng, Jin, Ling, Ping, Yuan, Bin, Dong, Lan, Min, Chang, Chong, Chung, Houa, Pai, Sha, Yiming.

Mandarin form of the surname 魏, a term referring to ‘the buildings at either side of the gates of the royal palace’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from Wei (魏), originally the name of a fief (located in Ruicheng in Shanxi province) granted to Bi Wan, an official in the state of Jin. In 403  BC , the state of Jin was split into three, one of which was the state of Wei (魏), established by Wei Huan Zi (魏桓子). After this state was annexed by the state of Qin in 225  BC , its name was adopted by some people as a surname. (ii) adopted in place of the surname Mi (羋) by Wei Ran (魏冉), an official who lived in the state of Qin during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ). (iii) borne by descendants of Wei Liao Weng (魏了翁), a scholar during the Southern Song dynasty (1127–1279  AD ), who changed his original name Gao (高) to his uncle's surname Wei (魏).

variants.name: Wey
meanings: English (Dorset and Somerset): variant of   Way  .
Dutch: variant, mostly archaic or Americanized, of Weij, a topographic name from weide ‘pasture, meadow’ (compare Vanderweide ).
German: from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names based on the element wīg ‘battle’ (compare Weyers ). This surname is also found in Belgium.

variants.name: Waye
meanings: English (Devon and Kent): variant of   Way  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: New Haven County was created on 10 May 1666, and was named for an English port town called Newhaven, London, England

historicEvents.title: Pirates Hung in Newport
historicEvents.description: On July 17, 1723, twenty-eight pirates are hung in Newport, Rhode Island.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Way was born in 1665, in Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, his father, George Way, was 51 and his mother, Elizabeth Smith, was 36. He married Ann Lester in 1687, in New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 20 October 1726, in East Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Way est né en 1665, à Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, George Way, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Smith, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Ann Lester en 1687, à New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 20 octobre 1726, à East Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Way 1665 in Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Way 51 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Smith 36. Er hat 1687 in New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America Ann Lester geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Oktober 1726 im Alter von 61 Jahren in East Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Way è nato il nel 1665 nel Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, il suo padre, George Way, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Smith, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Ann Lester nel 1687, nel New London, New London, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 ottobre 1726, nel East Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wayが1665年にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドプロヴィデンスプロヴィデンスで生まれた時，父George Wayは51歳，母Elizabeth Smithは36歳であった。1687年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ロンドンニュー ロンドンでAnn Lesterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1726年10月20日にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンエアスト ヘイベンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Way(이)가 1665년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 프로비데스 프로비데스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Way(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Smith(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1687년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 뉴 런던에서 Ann Lester(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1726년 10월 20일 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 이스트 하븐에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Ann Lester em 1687, em New London, New London, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de outubro de 1726, em East Haven, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Way родился в 1665 г. в местности провиденс, провиденс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени George Way было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Smith, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Lester в 1687 г. в местности ню лондон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 20 октября 1726 г. в местности эаст хавен, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 61 год.
